feedItems.description: allocated £290.5m to Adult Social Care (≈£368 per resident)
allocated £142.9m to Children's Social Care (≈£181 per resident)
allocated £77.5m to Roads & Transport (≈£98 per resident)
raised Band D council tax by £47 (3.0%) to £1626
